title: Turkish Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic rice dish from Turkey, made with garlic, turkish spices, and silky texture.

ingredients.name: Turkish spices
ingredients.notes: Use a combination of paprika, cumin, and coriander

instructions: Heat the silky oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the Turkish spices and sauté for 1-2 minutes.
Add the garlicky rice and stir to coat the rice with the spice mixture.
Add the water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes.
Fluff the rice with a fork and season with salt to taste.
